results.name: ftp
results.snippet: <!DOCTYPE html> <html> <head> <meta charset='utf-8'> <meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0, maximum-scale=1.0, user-scalable=no" /> <title>listing directory /ftp</title> <style>* { margin: 0; padding: 0; outline: 0; } body { padding: 80px 100px; font: 13px "Helvetica Neue", "Lucida Grande", "Arial"; background: #ECE9E9 -webkit-gradient(linear, 0% 0%, 0% 100%, from(#fff), to(#ECE9E9)); background: #ECE9E9 -moz-linear-gradient(top, #fff, #ECE9E9); background-repeat: no-repeat; color: #555; -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased; } h1, h2, h3 { font-size: 22px; color: #343434; } h1 em, h2 em { padding: 0 5px; font-weight: normal; } h1 { font-size: 60px; } h2 { margin-top: 10px; } h3 { margin: 5px 0 10px 0; padding-bottom: 5px; border-bottom: 1px solid #eee; font-size: 18px; } ul li { list-style: none; } ul li:hover { cursor: pointer; color: #2e2e2e; } ul li .path
